[IMPLEMENTATION]  
[FRAMEWORK]  
[REASONING]  
[ERROR PREVENTION]  

[IMPLEMENTATION]  
LOAD DATA FROM SCIKIT-LEARN  
SET UP GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL  
FIT MODEL WITH CROSS-VALIDATION  
EVALUATE PERFORMANCE USING TEST SET  

[FRAMEWORK]  
DEFINE DATA STRUCTURE  
SELECT FEATURES AND LABELS  
CONFIGURE HYPERPARAMETERS FOR TUNING  
IMPLEMENT CROSS-VALIDATION SCHEME  

[REASONING]  
ANALYZE MODEL PERFORMANCE  
COMPARE RESULTS WITH MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES  
DRAW CONCLUSIONS ABOUT MODEL EFFECTIVENESS  

[ERROR PREVENTION]  
CHECK DATA PREPROCESSING  
VALIDATE HYPERPARAMETER SETTINGS  
MONITOR MODEL FIT AND EVALUATION  
PREVENT OVERFITTING AND UNDERFITTING
